flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Charlotte Technical College fell 33% between 2021 and 2024 (81.7% → 54.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Charlotte Technical College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (72.5% vs 79.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Charlotte Technical College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (243 → 298).
